I am Niket Kumar, and I live in California, work at Google
I am Niket Kumar, and I live in California, work at Microsoft

Sundar Pichai announced in California that Google will invest $2 billion in AI research across Europe, India, and Japan by 2027. The initiative, led by Priya Sharma from IIT Bombay, was unveiled at the annual summit on 15 March.
